activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception verification not activated due to LC reference being part of DC No.

consignor.certificate_value: Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, 41380, Göteborg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' from certificate matches invoice issuer 'ELOF HANSSON TRADE AB' after normalization of company names and addresses. Address mismatch in details does not affect match. Country 'Sweden' matches exactly. Koncernstruktur rule applied due to explicit name occurrence in invoice header and address blocks.

consignee.certificate_value: DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED, FLAT/RM G2,17/F,LEGEND TOWER, NO.7 SHING YIP STREET, KWUN TONG, KL,HK, HONG KONG
consignee.invoice_value: DRYAD RESOURCES (HK) CO., LIMITED, FLAT/RM G2,17/F,LEGEND TOWER, NO.7 SHING YIP STREET, KWUN TONG, KL,HK, Hong Kong
consignee.motivation: Consignee name and address from certificate matches invoice buyer field exactly after normalization, including country 'Hong Kong'. Invoice has explicit 'Buyer' field matching certificate consignee.

goods_description.certificate_value: NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
goods_description.invoice_value: NBSK SODRA BLUE BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate matches invoice text exactly. General goods description rule applies with explicit invoice references in certificate (Invoice No SI051095, Order No SO046379) matching invoice details.

quantity.motivation: Quantity '1014 ADMT' in certificate matches '1 014 ADMT' in invoice after normalization (removal of thousand separator). Unit 'ADMT' and numeric value match with allowed formatting difference.

origin.motivation: Origin country 'Sweden' in certificate is explicitly stated in invoice under 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN'. EU-normalization applied but certificate specifies Sweden explicitly, verified explicitly in invoice.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikat och faktura. Certifikatets avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan entydigt verifieras mot fakturan.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla angivna uppgifter i certifikatet kan verifieras i fakturan. Dokumenten stämmer överens och kan godkännas automatiskt.
